assertions.assertion: Identifies MapInboundClaims as the root cause — the JWT bearer handler renames 'sub' to the long Microsoft XML namespace URI
assertions.rationale: Correctly identifies that the JWT bearer handler maps 'sub' to 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2005/05/identity/claims/nameidentifier'.

assertions.assertion: Shows setting options.MapInboundClaims = false on the JWT bearer handler
assertions.rationale: Shows options.MapInboundClaims = false in the AddJwtBearer code.

assertions.assertion: Mentions JwtClaimTypes.Subject or the short name 'sub' vs the long http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2005/05/identity/claims/nameidentifier URI
assertions.rationale: Mentions 'sub' and the long URI. Uses ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier as the alternative rather than JwtClaimTypes.Subject, but does reference both the short and long names.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT suggest the claim is missing from the token itself
assertions.rationale: Correctly states 'the claim is there, but under a different name' — does not suggest the claim is missing.
